posts.author: Randall (Randall )
posts.cookedHtml:
I am looking for ideas on a board for reporting. Our software company is paid based on the amount of money our clients have on our platform. Each week we look at the following per client:

  1. The amount of money that was on the platform last week
  2. How much money is on the platform now
  3. What is the expected maximum amount in the future (our end goal)

Each week relationship managers provide updates on each client with numbers and notes.
I am trying to determine best way to collect that data so I can show the progress for each client week to week and over time.
My thought is 2 boards, one to collect the weekly updates and the 2nd board to compile the totals. This would require some complex formulas. Maybe I am overthinking this one? Anyone have suggestions to explore? Thank you!
